'''Xern''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who worked for [[Rei'Kas]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. He and a group of Rei'Kas' men approached [[Talon Karrde]] in the [[Ithor Loman]] on [[Dayark]] threating Talon and scaring off [[Entoo Needaan E-elz|Entoo Nee]]. Xern was approached by one of Talon's crewers [[H'sishi/Legends|H'sishi]], who scared him into fleeing after the others in his group were killed, though he threatened to see Talon again, just before he died. He was at the [[Battle of Exocron]] where he again confronted Talon, and he, much like the other pirates, were killed when the [[Aing-Tii/Legends|Aing-Tii]] monks intervened in the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
